name: Kettlebell Overhead Extension to Halo
description: Hold the kettlebell by the horns at hip level. Raise it up and behind your head into a tricep extension position, then press it overhead and guide it into a halo around your head. Reverse direction on alternating rounds. Keep elbows close on the extension and move slowly through the halo. Use a LIGHT kettlebell — the overhead-to-halo transition loads the shoulder in a vulnerable position. Not recommended with pre-existing shoulder or rotator cuff issues.

media.caption: KB overhead extension to halo pyramid flow
